name: hUC-MSC exosome knee osteoarthritis dose-escalation pilot
summary: Prospective double-blind dose-randomized pilot of intra-articular human umbilical cord MSC-derived exosomes in mild to moderate knee osteoarthritis, without a placebo control arm.
population: Adults with mild to moderate knee osteoarthritis

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Extracellular Vesicle and Secretome Therapies because they can show whether the intervention changes function, biomarkers, safety, and mechanistic endpoints in Adults with mild to moderate knee osteoarthritis. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
